gateLoadFailed: Failed to read clone authorization status
fileErrorFormat: Only WAV / MP3 / M4A formats are supported
cloneSuccessToast: Clone succeeded and was added to your personal voice library
cloneFailedDefault: Clone failed, please try again later
segmentsNotOwnedError: The selected segments don't belong to the current speaker; please reselect
dialogDescription: After cloning, the CosyVoice voice will appear in your personal voice library and can be reused in later tasks.
gateDenied: This account is not on the CosyVoice clone allowlist. Contact an admin to request access.
gateGaDisabledSuffix: General availability has not been enabled yet.
uploadFileHint: WAV (PCM 16-bit) / MP3 / M4A · 3-60 seconds · ≤10 MB · ≥16 kHz · clear solo reading, no background music / other voices
segmentsSourceTitle: Use transcript segments from the current task
segmentsSourceHint: Check segments of 3-60 seconds; the backend stitches them into a sample (10-20 seconds recommended).

errorCode.forbiddenNotInAllowlist: This account is not on the CosyVoice clone allowlist
errorCode.cloneFeatureDisabled: CosyVoice cloning is not currently enabled
errorCode.consentRequired: You must confirm the authorization terms before submitting
errorCode.consentOutdated: The authorization terms have been updated; please read and check them again
errorCode.quotaExceeded: You've reached the limit for personal cloned voices; please delete some first
errorCode.clientSampleSourceMutex: Choose only one sample source (file or segments)
errorCode.clientMissingSourceSegments: Please select at least one segment as a sample
errorCode.clientConsentOutdated: The authorization version doesn't match; please refresh the page
